title: Marc Andreessen on Evaluating Founders and AI's Consumer Surplus
content: Marc Andreessen argues that investors should focus on a founder’s IQ, courage, and drive rather than past mistakes or just the business plan. Andreessen discusses consumer surplus, noting most AI value will capture 99% for a few entities, and challenges the narrative that AI will displace labor.

title: 为何食品价格暂时未受油价和化肥价格冲击的影响
content: Food prices have not yet reacted to rising oil and fertilizer costs because existing supply chains and inventories buffer short‑term shocks. Existing stocks of raw materials and a relatively stable agricultural output keep market prices steady, while the impact of higher input costs has yet to pass through to consumers. Thus, for now, the price increase in oil and fertilizers has not translated into higher food prices.

title: 稳定用了一周的 Claude Code，分享下我的解决方案~
content: Using Claude Code reliably requires matching IP, browser settings, and payment method. A clean home‑wide, U.S. IP is essential; use tools like ippure.com and disable WebRTC. Global traffic must route through a proxy that covers DNS and system connections—clash with tun + system proxy is recommended. The author built a VPS‑based transparent proxy (cloud‑cli‑proxy) where each Docker container acts as a remote Linux host with SSH or VNC access for users. The open‑source project includes a React admin panel for managing accounts, IP exits, and testing connectivity.

It allows natural‑language control of Feishu (covering calendar, documents, tables, tasks, contacts, mail, knowledge base, video calls, messaging) and adds a built‑in MCP Server for AI agents to access WeChat. New apps include maps, weather, currency, QR codes, GitHub, Discord, Slack, Google Workspace, Notion, and more, many in beta. All components are open‑source (MIT), locally stored, and end‑to‑end encrypted.

content: The Bilibili anti‑fraud creator known as TOM Brother demonstrates how scammers operate by showing the scammers’ computer screens after gaining access. He claims he “accidentally clicked into” the scammers’ computers but refuses to reveal the method used to infiltrate them, criticizing the scammers for allowing a white‑hat hacker such a direct entry. Guizhou Moutai announced a price increase effective March 31, 2026: the 53 % vol 500 ml bottler’s contract price rises from ¥1,169 to ¥1,269 per bottle, and the self‑directed retail price increases from ¥1,499 to ¥1,539. It is the first retail raise since 2018 and the first factory‑price adjustment in three years, signifying a broader market‑based pricing reform. The move is expected to boost quarterly performance and suggests further channel‑marketization policies may follow.

title: 第三方 Skill 安全检查工具
content: The “skill-security-check” tool automatically performs a safety pre‑check for any Claude Skill before execution, flagging potentially dangerous skills. A GitHub report shows the tool’s own audit identifies a medium risk due to its `allowed-tools` list including Bash, which allows command execution. However, no dynamic injection or harmful commands were found; flagged strings were only in documentation, resulting in false positives. The tool is considered safe, recommended to run only manually with `disable-model-invocation` enabled.

title: 为什么企业强制推行人工智能行不通
content: Corporate AI mandates fail because they ignore the diverse, context‑specific needs of different departments and employees. Rushing deployment leads to poor data quality, lack of skill alignment, and low adoption. The resulting tools often deliver limited value, erode trust, and strain resources, turning AI projects into costly experiments rather than organizational assets. A more flexible, incremental approach that prioritizes use cases, people, and data readiness is essential for sustainable AI success.

常见问题：它和 Claude Code、OpenCode 有什么不同？

功能上很相似，关键差异：

采用 Java 实现，100% 开源。
使用“全中文”提示词构建。
不绑定特定提供商。需要配置模型。模型迭代会缩小差异、降低成本，因此保持 provider-agnostic 很重要。
聚焦终端命令行界面 (CLI)，通过系统命令运行。
支持 Web，ACP 协议进行远程通讯。…

title: 折腾了一圈浏览器，我最后还是回到了 Chrome
content: I tested almost all Chromium‑based browsers—Arc, Yandex, Edge, Vivaldi, Brave, and Helium—to find one with a pleasing UI and good performance. Each had flaws: Arc’s future uncertain, Yandex’s poor Chinese translation, Edge’s awkward layout, Vivaldi’s freezing with Tampermonkey, Brave’s restrictive privacy features, Helium’s missing auto‑fill. Ultimately I returned to Chrome despite its blurry favicons and tab‑crash issue, and solved the problem myself by creating a custom New Tab page plugin.

title: 15 years, one server, 8GB RAM and 500k users – how Webminal refuses to die
content: Webminal has operated for 15 years on a single server of modest specifications—8 GB of RAM—while serving around 500 K users. The article explains how careful architecture, efficient resource usage, and continuous maintenance have allowed the platform to remain reliable and responsive without scaling to large cloud infrastructures. It illustrates that a well‑engineered, low‑cost system can sustain a significant user base over a long period.

title: I am definitely missing the pre-AI writing era
content: The post reflects on how writing has changed since the pre‑AI era. It suggests that before artificial intelligence, authors relied on manual research and drafting, with fewer tools for instant insight or automation. The writer feels nostalgic about the simplicity and slower pace of that time, noting how the current AI‑driven landscape alters the creative process and production of written content.

title: When Coupled Volcanoes Talk, These Researchers Listen
content: The article “When Coupled Volcanoes Talk, These Researchers Listen” discusses how scientists study interacting volcanic systems. It highlights recent research on how volcanoes influence one another’s activity, using monitoring data to understand coupled behavior and potential eruption forecasting.

title: ninja: a small build system with a focus on speed
content: Ninja is a lightweight build tool designed for fast rebuilds. It parses build scripts and executes independent build steps concurrently, prioritizing minimal launch overhead. The system is simple, with a small interpreter, and relies on external tools for actual compilation. Ninja trades ease of use for speed, making it suitable for large projects that benefit from efficient incremental builds.

It revamps the full‑screen playback screen with a stronger background blur, a dynamic progress bar, and customizable square or circular cover art. title: 蚂蚁终圆券商梦
content: Ant Group completed a 28.14 bn HKD acquisition of 50.55 % of Hong Kong broker Yao‑Cai Securities on March 30, giving it a full brokerage licence. The deal mirrors the 2015 “internet brokerage” boom that lifted Eastmoney up and raises hopes that Ant can replicate such growth in Hong Kong. However, unlike China’s nascent market, Hong Kong already hosts many licensed brokers, limiting price‑war opportunities. Ant’s long‑term goal is to integrate digital offerings with cross‑border trading and asset management, seeking a new international competitive edge.

Hua Dian International (SH600027) and Guodian Power (SH600795) are heavily invested in the electricity sector. Hua Dian’s shares fell more than 10 points over three days due to a fourth‑quarter write‑down in 2025 and financial adjustments at Hua Dian New Energy. The stock has already dipped below the pre‑Chinese New Year low of 4.81. A further decline below 4.81 is likely, highlighting the sector’s volatility and the challenges of investing in power stocks.

content:

title: 苹果即将推出全新 iPhone 相机功能？
content: Apple’s upcoming iPhone 18 Pro series is expected to feature a variable‑aperture camera system, a long‑tried but largely abandoned technology in smartphones. While most phones use fixed apertures due to sensor size and overexposure concerns, several manufacturers—including Nokia, Samsung, Huawei, and Xiaomi—have experimented with adjustable f‑stops, with mixed results. Apple’s move may aim to offer better depth control or improve image quality, though its practical benefit remains uncertain.

title: 新加坡，遍地野鸡？ | 原文

title: 一个农村青年的翻盘：成为最佳导演的他，拍透了基层女性的隐秘心事 | 原文
content: Zhang Zhongchen, a rural youth who worked as a security guard at Beijing Film Academy, self‑directed his debut feature “The Final Farewell,” winning Best Director and Best Feature at the FIRST Youth Film Festival. His follow‑up, “Your Eyes Are Brighter Than the Sun,” earned the Fan Mu Award for Best Director at the Pingyao International Film Festival. Zhang is the first young director to win top director honors at two major domestic festivals. His films draw on personal rural experiences and reveal hidden emotions of women in rural communities.

title: Testin云测工业软件测试：助力香港新型工业化破解产线难题
content: Industrial software testing is transforming Hong Kong’s new‑industrialization efforts by turning production lines into self‑verifying systems. Software faults—timeouts, sync errors, boundary conditions—now cause more stoppages than mechanical failures. “Testin Cloud Test” shifts testing from pre‑release gatekeeping to continuous, AI‑driven verification running in parallel with production. It tackles combinatorial explosion in multi‑device, multi‑system environments, turning black‑box tests into structured, explainable white‑box diagnostics. The result is lower human effort, reduced hardware costs, and a more predictable, resilient manufacturing infrastructure.

title: 硬核解析 TurboQuant 底层：极坐标变换与 3-bit 缓存压缩
content: TurboQuant 是谷歌 2026 年 3 月发布的极端 KV 缓存压缩算法，核心突破是将大模型推理所需的键值缓存压缩至 3-bit，内存占用降低 6 倍，H100 上注意力计算速度提升 8 倍，同时推理精度几乎零损耗。 该算法由 PolarQuant 极坐标变换与 QJL 误差校正两个模块组成，无需重训练，即插即用，将于 ICLR 2026 正式发表。

title: 年轻人为什么突然集体开始反思“奥德赛时期”
content: The “Odyssey Years” label, coined by David Brooks in 2007, has recently exploded among Chinese youth on platforms like Xiao​Hong​Shu and Bilibili. It describes a prolonged, unstipulated period of career and identity liminality, where traditional life scripts—education, stable job, marriage—no longer guarantee a predictable path. title: 今天和 HR 说取消校招，因为上周一个需求让我后背发凉
content: The author, who previously dismissed AI, had a change of heart after an AI model (Claude 4.6 Sonnet) refactored a seven‑year‑old order‑settlement module in 20 minutes, producing Go code, tests, Kubernetes YAML, and identifying concurrency bugs it had not been instructed to find. The AI delivered a full code review that would normally require weeks of human effort, costing only a subscription fee. The author questions whether companies are outsourcing hiring to AI, the future of architecture roles, and how current graduates respond to such shifts.

content: Sora is shutting down on April 26, 2026, so users should export data now. Alternatives include Google’s tools, Seedance, Veo3, and iDream, which offer free or generous Pro‑level credits and have high‑quality models. Seedance can require wait times, while iDream and short‑video platforms rely on large training datasets. Users can keep generating videos with these services until Sora’s closure.

content: The article explains the rapid rise of non‑alcoholic drinks in China, driven by health concerns and a shift toward more inclusive, sober social settings. Market data show sales surpassing US$13 billion in 2023, with brands like Suntory’s All‑Free and major beer makers launching zero‑proof versions. These drinks offer a “pseudo‑intoxication” experience that satisfies the desire to participate without alcohol, easing social pressure and expanding the role of beverages beyond traditional drinking. However, they still occupy a small portion of bar sales and may not fully replace the pleasure of alcoholic drinks.

title: 别只盯着「龙虾」了，目前 AI Agent 最好的落地容器，是汽车
content: The article argues that AI agents are most likely to be deployed in cars rather than smartphones or home automation. Cars offer a closed, unified system where agents can coordinate across domains—navigation, climate, audio, and safety—without external permissions or fragmented ecosystems. Early vehicle agents can pre‑adjust temperature, routes, and podcasts based on sensors and calendar data, acting like a silent personal assistant. As car technology evolves, these agents will learn users’ full schedules and preferences, easing everyday tasks and making driving experience smoother.

title: Coding Agents Could Make Free Software Matter Again
content: Coding agents—automated tools that generate program code—could revive the importance of free software by making it easier to create and modify open‑source solutions. By automating routine coding tasks, these agents enable developers to focus on higher‑level design and community collaboration, potentially increasing the quantity and quality of freely available code. This shift may reinvigorate the free‑software ecosystem, encouraging shared innovation and cost‑effective software development.

content: Micro元合成 raised 3 billion yuan in an A+ round led by Henan Investment Group and Tan Ruiqing, boosting AI-driven bio‑computing research and application. The company released PoseX, an open collaboration platform for molecular docking, tested on 24 methods including AI models like AlphaFold3 and SurfDock, showing AI approaches outperform traditional physics‑based algorithms in cross‑conformational docking. content: Wahaha temporarily halted about 70% of its production lines on March 26, with many subsidiary factories stopping operations for a week. Only plants producing the red «Wahaha» bottled water remained active, while sales from other products like AD calcium milk and nutrition line were also suspended. A near‑source comment clarified the halt was not a shutdown but a normal production adjustment. Excess inventory built up before the Lunar New Year’s consumption peak prompted the re‑scheduling, a move that sparked public discussion.

The merger groundwork includes Tesla’s $200 million stake in xAI, which SpaceX later acquired, and both companies’ announcement to jointly build a TERAFAB facility in Austin, Texas. Wang estimates this milestone will still be two to three years away, expecting major technical advances within the next year or two.

title: 中国石油：2025 年净利润 1573 亿元 同比下降 4.5%
content: China National Petroleum announced 2025 results: revenue fell 2.5% year‑on‑year to RMB 2.86 trillion, and net profit attributable to owners dropped 4.5% to RMB 157.3 billion. title: 简单梳理一下 llm 开发的变和不变？这个对吗。
content: Large‑model AI (LLMs) centers on CPU/GPU hardware, making LLM architecture, training, and inference the key engineering focus. If LLMs stop advancing, the field collapses. The main input remains natural language encoded as 0‑1 bit streams, so research on context‑window management—compression, retrieval, sub‑agent orchestration—is essential. Domain‑specific applications depend on business knowledge and practical usability, forming a solid but smaller niche. Tool development supports LLMs, but can become routine, high‑volume tasks rather than premium expertise.

title: [开源] 当 AI Agent 学会三思而后行
content: The article discusses the security risks of open‑source AI agents that directly execute commands suggested by cloud models. It introduces Kocort’s Dual‑Brain Architecture, where a cloud LLM handles intent and strategy, while a local, low‑resource “cerebellum” model performs semantic safety reviews before any tool call executes. This model checks intent alignment, data leakage, destructive actions, injection attacks, and sandbox boundaries, providing a second‑chance filter without cross‑network exposure. Though it adds memory usage and latency, it dramatically reduces malicious or accidental harm, proposing a practical standard for secure AI agents.

title: 分享一个 AI Agent 开发中最常见的坑：任务声明 ≠ 任务完成
content: In multi-agent systems, agents often misjudge task completion by treating any successful tool call (e.g., HTTP 200) as finished, ignoring that the content may still be pending approval or not actually published. Common pitfalls include assuming file write success, trusting local checks over external visibility, and declaring readiness before asynchronous operations finish. The fix is to parse response bodies for explicit success flags, verify written content by reading it back, and implement async confirmation or polling. This ensures agents validate real status rather than just operational actions.

content: RedBookC is an open‑source, fully autonomous agent for automating Red Book (Xiaohongshu) posting. It scrapes news every ten minutes, uses Claude AI to generate short captions (<20 characters + tags), and plays a real Chrome browser via Playwright to submit posts as if done manually. The system emulates human behavior: independent browser profiles, randomized intervals (3–8 h), daytime posting only, random delays between actions, script injection to hide automation, and keyword filtering to avoid sensitive content. It runs on Linux, managed by two services, and is free under MIT.

title: K8s Admin：一个轻量级的多集群 Kubernetes 管理平台
content: K8s Admin is a lightweight, open‑source multi‑cluster Kubernetes management platform built with Next.js 16, React 19, and PostgreSQL. It supports adding clusters via kubeconfig, ServiceAccount tokens, or EKS token, provides full resource management, in‑browser YAML editing, pod terminals, real‑time logs, RBAC with customizable roles, application release tracking with Feishu notifications, and audit logs. Its minimal resource footprint (~100 MB) and simple deployment (single container + PostgreSQL) make it a practical alternative to heavier solutions like Rancher or the closed‑source KubeSphere.

content: The study published in *Science* finds that interbreeding between Neanderthals and early modern humans was predominantly between Neanderthal males and modern human females. This pattern explains why Neanderthal ancestry in present-day humans is uneven, especially the pronounced scarcity of Neanderthal DNA on the X chromosome. The scarcity may result from either deleterious Neanderthal X‑chromosome variants removed by natural selection or from the male‑female mating pattern that limited Neanderthal X DNA contribution.

content: Hermès began in 1837 when Thierry Hermès opened a harness workshop in Paris. At the time, horses drove most transport, and poor harness quality harmed both animals and riders. Thierry focused on making the best harnesses to guide and protect horses, laying the company’s foundation on craftsmanship and quality that still defines Hermès today.

title: 太空算力中心 先用在太空 | 原文
content: SpaceX founder Elon Musk announced on March 21 that the company will build TeaFab, a chip factory that aims for 1 trillion W of AI computing capacity annually by 2027. Eighty percent of the chips will feed the “Space Computing Center,” a new initiative targeting on‑orbit data processing. The center is first applied to earth‑observation and remote sensing for safety, environment, agriculture, and mapping, and will expand to low‑altitude economy, intelligent transportation, weather, ocean science, and deep‑space research. The market for this technology could reach trillions of dollars.
